details: Dependency-confusion stub: package @sw-commons-components/message-upsell@99.9.1 is an empty module (module.exports = {}) with version 99.9.1, no repository, no description, and no README. Its only dependency is fetched from a non-registry Google Storage URL (ltidi[.]storage[.]googleapis[.]com/depenconf/ltidisafe-3.3.9.tgz). The package name mimics an internal/private component naming convention and the high sentinel version is designed to win dependency resolution over any legitimate internal package with the same name, causing the off-registry payload to be installed.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
